reproducibility_config.description: Complete hardware, software, and environment configuration for reproducing benchmark results on NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition.

gpu.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition
gpu.memory_bus_width_bit: not confirmed (run nvidia-smi -q for full spec)

system_memory.note: Shared across multi-GPU node; single GPU pod allocation

os.full_uname: Linux 6.8.0-86-generic #87-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Mon Sep 22 18:03:36 UTC 2025 x86_64

nvidia_driver.note: Host driver; CuTile requires >= 13.0, provided via cuda-compat

environment_setup.description: Critical environment variables required to run CuTile on this pod
environment_setup.note: CuTile requires CUDA 13.1 compat libraries to override the host driver 12.8. Without this LD_LIBRARY_PATH, CuTile will fail with 'Minimum driver version required is 13.0, got 12.8'.

cutile_specific_config.note_sm_120_fix: Original code had num_ctas=ct.ByTarget(sm_100=2) which MISSED sm_120, causing 4x slowdown. Fixed by adding sm_120=2.

wmma_kernel_fix.issue: Original wmma_kernel.cu used NUM_STAGES=3 (triple buffering) requiring 56KB shared memory, exceeding sm_120's 48KB per-block limit.
wmma_kernel_fix.fix: Reduced NUM_STAGES from 3 to 2 (double buffering), bringing shared memory to ~38KB.

known_hardware_differences_from_paper_dr.note: The paper draft references H100/A100. Actual benchmarks run on RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition.
known_hardware_differences_from_paper_dr.architecture: Blackwell (sm_120) instead of Hopper (sm_90) or Ampere (sm_80)
known_hardware_differences_from_paper_dr.peak_bf16_tensor_core_tflops_dense: 835 (hardcoded in benchmark scripts — needs verification for RTX PRO 6000)
known_hardware_differences_from_paper_dr.action_needed: Update paper and benchmark scripts to reflect actual GPU specs
